//: release-please derives the version from Conventional Commit messages. We squash-merge, so the squashed commit message is the PR title, which .github/workflows/pr-title.yml lints as a Conventional Commit. feat: bumps minor, fix:/perf: bump patch, and a ! or BREAKING CHANGE bumps major; chore:/docs:/ci:/etc. do not bump the number but are still recorded in the changelog via changelog-sections below.

..//changelog-sections: Only feat/fix/perf trigger a version bump, but we list every commit type here so the CHANGELOG records internal-only changes too.
